title: Core Models Path
description: Build fluency in Core Models inside Neural Networks by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: 3D Convolutional Neural Network (3D CNN)
steps.summary: ** 3D Convolutional Neural Network (3D CNN) belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Neural Networks / Core Models. Start after CNN (Convolutional Neural Network) and Convolutional Neural Network.
steps.whyIncluded: A foundational concept in Core Models — start here to build vocabulary and core intuition before moving to techniques and extensions.
